mission.title: istio: Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for JWT's arrays into nested objects
mission.description: Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for JWT's arrays into nested objects. This issue affects 18+ users.

steps.title: Identify istio troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your istio deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review istio configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant istio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get configmap -n istio-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio
```
Hello,

I want to report an issue found reading the JWT token by the AuthorizationPolicy-kind YAML.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for JWT's arrays…
Confirm Istio's AuthorizationPolicy doesn't look for… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n istio-system --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n istio-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Hello, we have the same problem.  We cannot read "client.sco" value or any value from a nested node 
```{
  "iss": "******",
  "jti": "******",
  "azp": "******",
  "iat": 000000000,
  "exp": 000000000,
  "nonce": "0000000",
  "ver": 1,
  "client": {
    "cli": "***",
    "pid": "*",
    "pty": "***",
    "uid": "*",
    "sco": "read write"
  },
  "cnf": {
    "jwks": [
      {
        "kid":
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"
kind: "AuthorizationPolicy"
metadata:
  name: "test-authorization-policy"
  namespace: dev
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: test
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        # paths: ["/test*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[realm_access.roles]
      values: ["TEST-READ"]

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with istio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
